title: Zinnia Flower Building Blocks Set – Make Your Own Bouquet Faux Plant Bricks Toy Kits – for Kids 6+ and Adults
features: CREATE YOUR OWN BOUQUET : Choose from Orchid (112 pieces), Sunflower (167 pieces), Rose (120 pieces), Chrysanthemum (97 pieces), Jasmine (157 pieces), Paper Brush (78 Pieces), Blue Clover (198 Pieces), Zinnia (84 Pieces), Peony (99 Pieces) and a Vase (177 pieces) for stunning floral displays
COMPATIBLE WITH TOP BRANDS : Designed to work seamlessly with leading building block brands, offering endless customisation possibilities for creative arrangements
DECORATIVE AND DURABLE : Completed flowers stand 30 cm tall, making them perfect as vibrant and maintenance-free home or office decor
FUN AND EDUCATIONAL : Encourages STEM learning by enhancing fine motor skills, problem-solving, and creativity in a hands-on, screen-free activity for adults and children aged 6 years+
EASY-TO-BUILD DESIGN : Includes clear instructions to guide kids and adults through a relaxing and rewarding assembly process
EVERLASTING FLOWERS : These colourful block flowers bring charm to any space without wilting, making them a perfect alternative to fresh blooms!
description: Product description Bring vibrant blooms to your space with these Flower Building Blocks Sets, a fun and creative way to craft your own bouquet. Choose from intricate Orchid, radiant Sunflower, classic Rose, elegant Chrysanthemum designs and many more, and create a stylish Flower Vase to put them all in. Each kit includes colourful, interlocking block pieces and detailed instructions to guide you through the assembly process. Compatible with leading building block brands, these kits allow endless customisation and creativity. Completed flowers stand 30 cm tall, making them striking decorative pieces for your home or office. The block bouquet offers a durable and maintenance-free alternative to fresh flowers. This set is perfect for promoting STEM learning, encouraging fine motor skills, spatial awareness, and imaginative play. Whether for children aged 6+ or adults seeking a relaxing project, the building process provides an engaging and rewarding experience. Ideal for gifting, the Flower Building Blocks Set makes a thoughtful present for birthdays and family activities. Combine multiple sets to create a personalised bouquet display or use individual flowers to brighten specific spaces. With these kits, you can enjoy the beauty of nature without the upkeep, all while fostering creativity and hands-on fun. Directions Included
